title: How to verify and reconcile stock market transactions in AIS before filing your ITR
summary: Annual Information Statement (AIS) stock market transaction reconciliation helps taxpayers ensure accurate ITR filing by matching broker records with AIS data. It improves capital gains accuracy, prevents errors and supports compliant income tax reporting for investors in equity markets.

title: NRIs looking to park your dollars? Ujjivan SFB offers 7.5%, DBS up to 5.6% on FCNR deposits
summary: Banks are raising returns on FCNR(B) deposits after the RBI eased norms to attract foreign currency inflows. Ujjivan Small Finance Bank now offers 7.5% on 3–5-year USD FCNR deposits, while DBS Bank India provides up to 5.6%, giving NRIs more attractive options to park their dollar savings.

title: SBI Mutual Fund planning IPO launch on July 13, to raise $1.2 billion
summary: SBI Mutual Fund is set to launch its IPO on July 13, with a likely $1.2 billion issue size, making it one of the biggest in India’s financial sector. The offer-for-sale issue will see SBI and Amundi pare their stakes, with the price band announcement expected on July 9.
